{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323193214ED2DC6182D30C86E8B82"}"},"total":19},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7617410554266944281","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"全新设定，家园，撤离模式，该有的都会有"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773570129,"group_id":"7611071118287326232","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"创作书世界，共赴新人生","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8InLbZpuF8zMQgsbiwZ9Z4bX5HUPGsgsRTD0LaIbm7x","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5870ec6707104976a8fc0fdd4114d4f6~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795263&x-signature=YCbm4jBcJLfVtQhvl52TwEHAzms%3D","user_id":"3756358177130695","user_name":"阴间说书人"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3756358177130695","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.2","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7611071118287326232","book_info":{"abstract":"【全民求生】+【末日降临】+【丧尸、异兽、鬼怪、邪神】+【家园模式】+【资源补给】+【多女主】+【每日结算】
　　黑暗禁区突然将蓝星吞并，全球几十亿人被迫开启生存挑战模式。
　　开局一间房，资源全靠找。
　　就在大家为了一瓶矿泉水、一袋方便面去以身涉险时，张玄却等待着今日的保底结算。
　　【资源卡·泉眼】（大红）：别人还在为一瓶矿泉水发愁，你已经可以每日收获500升。
　　【建筑卡·卫生间】（大红）：别人去家园外上个厕所都有生命危险，可你已经实现了厕所自由、洗漱自由。
　　【训练卡·箭场】（大红）：别人连一支弓箭都要省着用，你却已经炼成了神箭手。
　　【升级卡·建筑】（大红）：别人还在自己手搓房屋，你一刷卡屋子瞬间升级。
　　【角色卡·精灵弓箭手】（大红）：别人还在亲力亲为，你已经有精灵妹子贴身照顾了。
　　当大家为了资源出生入死，甚至打打杀杀的时候。
　　张玄已经成了黑暗禁区最大的禁忌。
　　丧尸？玩具而已。
　　怪兽？宠物而已。
　　邪神？那得好好养着，别吃灭绝了。
　　……
　　“我现在的成就，靠的是我的天赋、我的努力，我的汗水。”
　　“我要一天一天活到最后！”
　　“继续结算，继续升级！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/d3bee7f62761c08c593f21ead5d24c09~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"阴间说书人","author_id":"","book_id":"7611071118287326232","book_name":"全民家园求生，一天一次大红保底","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#383038","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":515,"name":"末日求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=515&name=末日求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7611071163518698008","read_count":"26549","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"155187"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"65","tags":"科幻末世,末日求生,末世,系统,穿越,求生,多女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d3bee7f62761c08c593f21ead5d24c09~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779449534&x-signature=9knBcuawlGakeaHuoup8BqgnXJI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3756358177130695","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"46"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323193214ED2DC6182D30C86E8B82"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":11136,"read_book_count":0,"reply_count":6,"show_pv":2766},"user_action":{"author":1,"author_digg_time":1773586469,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7617498344795882264","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"荒天帝对得起所有人，但唯独对不起星斗大森林里的云韵，都怪云山包办婚姻非要云凌娶小舞，唐三为了救小舞抢了石昊的百万年魂环，要不然石昊就是九红一蓝金了，凤清儿为了救石昊，用痴情咒挡下了唐三的神技一去不返，不过石昊最后继承炎帝，修习焚诀惩戒与守护兼修，获得了永恒与创造之神印王座，并且获得了诛仙剑和修罗魔剑的认可，三上云岚宗斩杀了挂神唐三，抢回了百万年魂环，为了八域众生石昊闭关冲击全系禁咒，用伏龙翔天给了十四翼大天使沙利叶一记龙抬头，接着一招万剑归宗 天使圣剑，七杀剑修罗魔剑诛仙剑 诡爷残剑合而为一斩杀了大天使沙利叶，虽然凝华邪珠碎裂，恶魔系被毁，但从此天下无神，最后石昊剥离了第十魂环，复活了凤清儿，并且创造了无尽火域，实现了一念永恒，此后未央龟镇守火域，护佑八域众生，石昊望着下界，留下一句:一天是不良人一辈子都是不良人!","text_exts":[{"e":136,"s":132,"text":"神印王座","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%A5%9E%E5%8D%B0%E7%8E%8B%E5%BA%A7&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774265534C86E8B82%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227617498344795882264%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227611071118287326232%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%A5%9E%E5%8D%B0%E7%8E%8B%E5%BA%A7%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":214,"s":211,"text":"龙抬头","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%BE%99%E6%8A%AC%E5%A4%B4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774265534C86E8B82%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227617498344795882264%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227611071118287326232%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%BE%99%E6%8A%AC%E5%A4%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":353,"s":350,"text":"不良人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%8D%E8%89%AF%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774265534C86E8B82%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227617498344795882264%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227611071118287326232%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%8D%E8%89%AF%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773590242,"group_id":"7611071118287326232","service_id":2,"
